# v1.1.0 — Bilingual Skill Packages / 双语 Skill 包

## English

- **Renamed** from `round-harness` to `mini-harness` (lightweight harness positioning)
- **Two Skill packages**: `agent-harness-en/` (English) and `agent-harness-zh/` (Chinese)
- **Split docs**: `docs/en/` and `docs/zh-CN/`
- Install: `npx skills add HYX-LHJ/mini-harness --skill agent-harness-en -g -y` (or `agent-harness-zh`)

## 中文

- **项目更名**：`round-harness` → `mini-harness`（突出轻量级 harness）
- **两个 Skill 包**：`agent-harness-zh/`（中文）、`agent-harness-en/`（英文）
- **文档拆分**：`docs/zh-CN/` 与 `docs/en/`
- 安装：`npx skills add HYX-LHJ/mini-harness --skill agent-harness-zh -g -y`（或 `agent-harness-en`）
